rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §264.409 governs administrative contracts for children's advocacy centers. No overlap.
quote: The commission shall contract with one statewide organization that is exempt from federal income taxation under Section 501(a), Internal Revenue Code of 1986
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and children's advocacy center administrative contracting statute.
